/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Ibadah.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libIbadah.so -o libIbadah.so CMakeFiles/Ibadah.dir/GDExtension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ibadah.dir/Scenes/Main/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ibadah.dir/Scenes/Main/MainSceneLoader/MainSceneLoader.cpp.o  /home/B0LD/Projects/Ibadah/IbadahCXX/Dev/../../godot-cpp/bin/libgodot-cpp.linux.template_debug.x86_64.a
